HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DANIEL BURNS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. DANIEL BURNS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN.
